segments.text: Take a sharp knife, take a barber's razor, and cause it to pass upon thine head and upon thy beard: then take balances to weigh, and divide the hair.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Burn with fire a third part in the midst of the city, when the days of the siege are fulfilled: and take a third part, and smite about it with a knife: and a third part shall scatter in the wind; and I will draw out a sword after them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Take thereof a few in number, and bind them in thy skirts.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Take of them again, and cast them into the midst of the fire, and burn them in the fire; for thereof shall a fire come forth into all the house of Israel.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: This is Jerusalem: I have set it in the midst of the nations and countries that are round about her.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: She hath changed my judgments into wickedness more than the nations, and my statutes more than the countries that are round about her: for they have refused my judgments and my statutes, they have not walked in them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Because ye multiplied more than the nations that are round about you, and have not walked in my statutes, neither have kept my judgments, neither have done according to the judgments of the nations that are round about you;
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Behold, I, even I, am against thee, and will execute judgments in the midst of thee in the sight of the nations.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will do in thee that which I have not done, and whereunto I will not do any more the like, because of all thine abominations.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The fathers shall eat the sons in the midst of thee, and the sons shall eat their fathers; and I will execute judgments in thee, and the whole remnant of thee will I scatter into all the winds.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Surely, because thou hast defiled my sanctuary with all thy detestable things, and with all thine abominations, therefore will I also diminish thee; neither shall mine eye spare, neither will I have any pity.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: A third part of thee shall die with the pestilence, and with famine shall they be consumed in the midst of thee: and a third part shall fall by the sword round about thee; and I will scatter a third part into all the winds, and I will draw out a sword after them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Thus shall mine anger be accomplished, and I will cause my fury to rest upon them, and I will be comforted: and they shall know that I the LORD have spoken it in my zeal, when I have accomplished my fury in them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Moreover I will make thee waste, and a reproach among the nations that are round about thee, in the sight of all that pass by.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So it shall be a reproach and a taunt, an instruction and an astonishment unto the nations that are round about thee, when I shall execute judgments in thee in anger and in fury and in furious rebukes. I the LORD have spoken it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When I shall send upon them the evil arrows of famine, which shall be for their destruction, and which I will send to destroy you: and I will increase the famine upon you, and will break your staff of bread:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So will I send upon you famine and evil beasts, and they shall bereave thee; and pestilence and blood shall pass through thee; and I will bring the sword upon thee. I the LORD have spoken it.
segments.speaker: God
